title: Metrics view slides offscreen and leaves blank viewport
description:
## Reproduction
1. Open the Kanbus console board view.
2. Click the panel toggle from Board to Metrics.
3. Observe the transition animation.

## Actual behavior
- Metrics appears initially in the same viewport region as the board.
- Both board and metrics then slide left together.
- The viewport ends up blank.

## Expected behavior
- Metrics panel should start offscreen to the right.
- During toggle, board slides out left and metrics slides into viewport.
- Final state should show metrics fully in viewport, with no blank frame.

## Suspected cause
The sliding track relies on two fixed-width panels, but display:none / hidden collapses one panel during animation while transform still uses translateX(-50%). This breaks panel geometry and causes the offscreen result.

## Acceptance criteria
- Switching Board -> Metrics places metrics content in viewport after transition.
- Switching Metrics -> Board returns board to viewport after transition.
- Inactive panel is non-interactive but still reserves layout width for animation math.
- Automated UI test asserts metrics view intersects viewport after toggle.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Closing as completed: metrics view sliding-offscreen bug verified fixed.
